what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment tied to the design-source channel, referencing a specific deck slide image via a custom URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: References slide p-09 of deck1-2026 through a custom image:// URI
Is a bare attachment ledger entry with no caption or description
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Custom URI scheme for internal asset targeting
concerns: The image:// URI is opaque and not resolvable from this file alone
No title, caption, or description for the attachment
No indication of which channel memory entry owns this attachment
Only an added timestamp, no modified or version metadata
notes: A minimal attachment ledger entry that links a design-source channel memory item to deck1-2026 slide p-09.
questions: Which channel memory entry references this attachment?
How is the image://design-source/deck1-2026/p-09 URI resolved to an actual file?
What visual or semantic content appears on deck1-2026/p-09?
Who or what process added this attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches content: it is an attachment metadata record pointing to an image target.
intention_signals: To create a persistent, queryable link between a design-source channel memory record and a specific image asset in a deck.
novelty: The custom image:// URI scheme for internal asset referencing is the most distinctive element; otherwise the record is conventional metadata.
contribution: Provides a dated, typed, URI-grounded attachment reference that a fused system can use to correlate design-source channel memory with a specific deck image asset.
summary_for_embedding: Markdown attachment metadata record att-d2f8764e in the design-source channel pointing to the image asset image://design-source/deck1-2026/p-09 with an added timestamp and no body content.
intention_for_embedding: To log a dated image attachment linking a design-source channel memory entry to slide p-09 of deck1-2026.
